title: vsjitdebugger.exe
html:
vsjitdebugger.exe

Just-In-Time (JIT) debugger included with Visual Studio

Execute

Execution of local PE file as a subprocess of Vsjitdebugger.exe.

Vsjitdebugger.exe {PATH:.exe}

Executes specified executable as a subprocess of Vsjitdebugger.exe. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User
